title: The Voyage of Snedgus and Mac Riagla
description: The Voyage of Snedgus and Mac Riagla
introduction: The Voyage of Snedgus and Mac Riagla

translation.text: Two monks of Iona were exiled by storm. They sailed past wonders. They came to an island where Enoch and Elijah lived. They returned with knowledge of paradise.
